nasb.text: But according to His promise we are looking for new heavens and a new earth, in which righteousness dwells.

esv.text: But according to his promise we are waiting for new heavens and a new earth in which righteousness dwells.

cnv.text: 但是我們按照他所應許的，等候新天新地，有公義在那裡居住。

ccb.text: 但我们等候的是上帝应许的新天新地，有公义住在其中。

csbs.text: 但照着他的应许，我们等候着一个新天新地，有公义居住在那里。
